title: Add contact number and address to landing page

requirements.summary: Display institute contact number (+91-9717044953) and address (Janakpuri, Delhi) on the landing page Footer
acceptanceCriteria: The phone number +91-9717044953 is visible and correctly formatted in the Footer contact section.
The address 'Janakpuri, Delhi' is visible in the Footer contact section.
Contact details are styled consistently with the existing dark navy/orange/yellow design theme.
Contact details are readable on both desktop and mobile viewports.

file_operations.description: Update the Footer's contact info column to display the institute's phone number (+91-9717044953) and address (Janakpuri, Delhi). Ensure the phone number is formatted consistently (e.g., '+91-9717044953' or '+91 9717044953') and both details are styled with the existing dark navy/orange/yellow theme. Verify responsive readability on mobile and desktop viewports.
